reason: All internal checks are consistent: line items sum exactly to the invoice total (16,061,760 CLP), unit price (66,924 CLP) × 240 m² matches the total and sits below the 68,000 CLP regional benchmark, every over-threshold line item (WP1, WP3, WP5) has a committee approval while WP2/WP4 fall legitimately under the 1,000,000 CLP threshold, dates follow a coherent sequence (works start 2026-02-16 → progress photos 03-03 to 03-30 → completion 04-01 → invoice/approvals 04-04), photo geotags cluster within ~200 m of the declared site, quantities match the contract, and custody shows tamper-evident handling by the fiscalizer.

The bundle is internally consistent: the invoice total (13,240,008 CLP) exactly equals 24 units at the stated unit price and the sum of the four line items, stays under the funded target, is only ~6% above the regional benchmark, all over-threshold line items carry committee approvals, the timeline (start 02-15 → dated progress photos 02-17 to 03-06 → completion 03-14 → invoice/approvals 03-16) is properly ordered, photo geotags cluster within a few hundred meters of the site, and custody is hash-sealed WORM from capture.
